testcase.name: test_get_users_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_47_fixes.py:63: in test_get_users_list assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_47_fixes.py:73: in test_get_users_with_pagination assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
